stage_c_boundary.notes: Authoritative Stage C closure surface; reporters should expose its counterpart once executable.

minimal_credible_adapter.notes: Adapter: full closure + observables with matching signature; add when locally executable.

mdl_fejer_axioms.notes: Fejér/MDL monotonicity seam; surface as a check or TODO in reporters.

shift_seam_certificates.notes: Closest-point / Fejér / defect-collapse seam; surface as a check or TODO.

observable_package.notes: Observable boundary (proved/excluded/forward claims); align with observable_surrogates.

known_limits_qft_bridge.notes: Known-limits bridge; keep as non-claim until executable counterpart exists.
